Charges: Unlimited
AC: 18
Effect: Glamour (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45

Race: BAR TRL OGR VAH FRG

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: HEAD
Charges: Unlimited

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:

Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 18:42:57
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 571pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common

Iksar useable?
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2002 at 3:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592343500381
View User Forum
10 posts
Someone offering to sell me one of these swore that theirs was shm/all. Could it be that older or newer ones are useable by Iksar?
▲ Page top
RE: Iksar useable?
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2004 at 4:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791736422
48 posts
i currently see that BAR, TRL, VAH, OGR and FRG can wear this only, SHM class
▲ Page top
RE: Iksar useable?
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2002 at 8:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767656072
10 posts
Iksar cannot wear any jaundiced bone armors. This is due to the fact that iksar can't wear plate armor, because of their scaly skin, or some wierd thing like that.
▲ Page top
RE: Iksar useable?
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2006 at 4:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591839254938
Scholar
163 posts
Iksar can be warrior and shadow knight class , therefore, yes, Iksar CAN wear plate !!!
▲ Page top
RE: Iksar useable?
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2010 at 7:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1702858585426
Scholar
633 posts
Nope, classic error - trying to apply logic to EQ.

When Iksar originated, [due to the race "enhancements" (ie regen, swimming etc.)they were born with], they were not allowed to wear "plate" as a "rule".

Well that being then and this now...exceptions prove the rule, rules are meant to be broken, the universe tends toward entropy, man is never perfect, it's a rule of thumb not meant to be perfectly exact... whatever you want to say or apply - things become less critical and change.
▲ Page top
RE: Iksar useable?
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2002 at 12:14 AM Rating: Default
Kilraa
99 posts
To the best of my knowledge, these have never been useable by Iksar.

Kilraa Shadowweaver
Templar of the 59th Circle
Officer of Dark Legion
Master of the Arcane
Povar
____________________________
Mistress Eilonwy Fensalir
Grand Summoner of the 86th Circle
Catalysts
Povar

"Stupidity isn't punishable by death. If it was, there would be a hell of a population drop."
-Laurell K. Hamilton
▲ Page top
Underpriced?
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2002 at 1:26 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773269740
118 posts
Ok, here is my analysis.

1)This helm gives a very good AC. We all know that healers and buffers taunt mobs off the tanks quite easily. Higher AC = Live Longer

2) Alchemy is very costly from what I have been told. Higher charisma will reduce the cost of making potions.

Anyway, I traded Tolan's darkwood gauntlets with this. I think it's a fair trade, if I didn't get the better end of the deal.

Dali the lizzie SK
Vendetta Factor
Rallos Zek

▲ Page top
360 or less
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2002 at 4:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756505381
Scholar
1,075 posts

People can't sell these in the bazaar on tribunal, consequentally you see them on many vendors for around 360 plat (if I remember right)

There are a TON of these in circulation. Essentailly its ONLY 18 ac since charisma kit stuff is cheap as heck and shaman's get great charisma spells.

No, actually it is level 46. I distinctly remember being level 45 and thinking "Sweet, my ES Vams will proc and help me through this hell level" but they didn't. At level 46 they did.

46.

QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 10:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251064527
110 posts
Hmm.. that's right. Isn't it so silly that items drop off mobs that can't wear them. Man, I think Trakanon shouldn't drop all those Breastplates, because none of them are Dragon wearable. Give me a break!
▲ Page top
RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2002 at 12:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752385272
View User Forum
45 posts

I'm not surprised to see anything drop off a dragon. I figure the Dragon won the fight, and the items were consumed.

Given that reasoning, I guess the Iksar > Shaman

RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2001 at 9:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758496041
Scholar
46 posts
Try not to be so literal about things like this, please. It is a Jaundiced Bone helm, doesn't that sound like something to be gained from a necromancer? Besides, when have NPCs had to follow the rules - such as casting distance, mana, etc...

__DEL__1592248265399
17 posts
if ye think about it the pic of the necro on allakhazams shows no graphic head piece. i personally dont know what the head piece looks like hence i just like looking at higher level drops and monsters being a 22 cleric i obviously dont know much but it was probably in the necros inventory. Sketelmona's prior post
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 11:45 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Sketelmona, from now on think of yourself as fair game to be killed and looted. Imagine the possibility that 5 minutes prior to running into Faydwer on your way through TD you happened to pick up a fine steel long sword since you were on the way to town anyways. Faydwer decides to loot you and what does he find? Why the hell does this necro have a sword!?!?!

Just something to ponder about "odd" drops.

Bloxr Fatso
48 Troll shaman of the Nameless
